auth.label: API Key
auth.description: remove.bg API key sent with the X-Api-Key header. Create it from your remove.bg account as described at https://www.remove.bg/r/api-how-to-get-api-key.

actions.name: get_account
actions.description: Fetch the current remove.bg credit balance and free API call allowance for the authenticated account.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

total.description: The total credits available to the account.

subscription.description: The subscription credits available to the account.

payg.description: The pay-as-you-go credits available to the account.

enterprise.description: The enterprise credits available to the account.

freeCalls.description: The number of free API calls still available.

sizes.description: The available output size tier reported by remove.bg.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for fetching remove.bg account information.

actions.name: remove_background
actions.description: Remove the background from an image with remove.bg and upload the generated image or ZIP result to local transit storage. Provide exactly one of imageUrl or contentBase64; use shadowType and shadowOpacity for shadows.

imageUrl.description: A publicly reachable source image URL. Provide exactly one of imageUrl or contentBase64.

contentBase64.description: Raw Base64-encoded source image bytes. Provide exactly one of imageUrl or contentBase64.

size.description: The maximum output resolution. Use preview for cheaper low-resolution output, auto for the best available size, full for up to 25MP, or 50MP for the highest supported size.

type.description: The foreground type to detect or enforce. Use auto unless the subject category is already known.

typeLevel.description: How specific remove.bg should be when classifying the detected foreground type. Use latest for the most current classes, or none when classification metadata is not needed.

format.description: The output format. Use auto for the default, png or webp for transparency, jpg when no transparency is needed, or zip for high-resolution transparent workflows.

roi.description: Region of interest as 'x1 y1 x2 y2' using px or % coordinates. Only content inside this rectangle can be detected as foreground.

crop.description: Whether to crop away empty transparent regions around the result.

cropMargin.description: Extra margin to keep around the cropped subject, such as '30px', '10%', or four CSS-like side values. Only applies when crop is true.

scale.description: Subject scale relative to the output canvas, such as '75%' or 'original'. Scaling implies centered positioning unless position is also set.

position.description: Subject position in the output canvas, such as 'original', 'center', '50% 50%', or another remove.bg-supported position value.

channels.description: Whether to return the finalized RGBA image or only the alpha mask. Use rgba for normal background removal results.

shadowType.description: A single shadow style for the result. Use auto, car, 3D, drop, or none. Prefer this over the deprecated add_shadow API parameter.

shadowOpacity.description: A single shadow opacity for the result. Use auto or a value from 0 to 100 when shadowType is set.

semitransparency.description: Whether to keep supported semi-transparent regions in the result, currently most useful for car windows.

backgroundColor.description: A solid background color to apply, such as a hex color or color name. Do not combine with backgroundImageUrl or backgroundContentBase64.

backgroundImageUrl.description: A publicly reachable background image URL to apply. Do not combine with backgroundColor or backgroundContentBase64.

backgroundContentBase64.description: Raw Base64-encoded background image bytes to upload as the background image. Do not combine with backgroundColor or backgroundImageUrl.

backgroundFileName.description: Optional filename for backgroundContentBase64 uploads. Only set this when backgroundContentBase64 is provided.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for removing an image background with remove.bg. Provide exactly one of imageUrl or contentBase64, and at most one background replacement.

downloadUrl.description: The local transit URL for downloading the generated file.

sizeBytes.description: The size of the generated file in bytes.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the generated file.

file.description: A generated file uploaded to local transit storage.

contentType.description: The MIME type of the generated result file.

contentLength.description: The size of the generated result file in bytes.

width.description: The width of the generated result image.

height.description: The height of the generated result image.

foregroundType.description: The detected foreground type returned by remove.bg.

creditsCharged.description: The credits charged for this request.

foregroundTop.description: The top position of the detected foreground.

foregroundLeft.description: The left position of the detected foreground.

foregroundWidth.description: The width of the detected foreground.

foregroundHeight.description: The height of the detected foreground.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for removing an image background.

actions.name: submit_improvement
actions.description: Submit a source image to the remove.bg improvement program for future model quality improvements.

imageUrl.description: A publicly reachable source image URL. Provide exactly one of imageUrl or contentBase64.

contentBase64.description: Raw Base64-encoded source image bytes. Provide exactly one of imageUrl or contentBase64.

fileName.description: Optional source image filename sent to remove.bg for the improvement submission.

tag.description: Optional grouping tag for related improvement submissions.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for submitting an image to the remove.bg improvement program. Provide exactly one of imageUrl or contentBase64.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for submitting an image improvement sample.
